top_signals.title: Warsh Signals Inflation Progress | Open Interest 7/1/2026
top_signals.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Fed Chair Kevin Warsh takes center stage in Sintra with fresh signals on inflation and price stability, while the ECB weighs the global outlook. Plus, Anthropic's Fable 5 gets the green light as Meta accelerates its AI cloud push.  National Grid CEO Zoë Yujnovich joins Open Interest on her company's role in powering the AI boom, and EQT's Eric Liu on where private equity is finding the next AI winners. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Buy the UK DIP? Defense stocks lifted by $20 billion spending boost as gilts come under fire
top_signals.summary: British defense stocks are marching higher once again after the U.K. confirmed a near-$20 billion military spending boost on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The town that Elon Musk built
top_signals.summary: A new city of SpaceX workers is emerging out of the Texas sand

top_signals.title: Symbiotic officially pivots to collateral markets with Core V2 launch
top_signals.summary: Symbiotic now powers shared collateral infrastructure that can support multiple DeFi use cases like insurance, credit, and RWAs.
